message:
🐛 Fix Kube Craft always placing grass block (#2716)

handleMouseDown and handleMouseMove were memoized with empty
dependency arrays, causing them to capture the initial
handleClick closure where selectedBlock was always 'grass'.

Use refs (selectedBlockRef, isErasingRef) so the memoized
handlers always read the current selection state.

Fixes #2656

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
